title: Impersonation countdown timer
notes: Self-updating timer. Subscribes to the platform.impersonation.{platform_user_id} broadcast so extensions AND force-terminations propagate in real time (< 1s latency).
The client-side tick loop updates every second locally + reconciles with the broadcast payload; the DB is the source of truth so a drift of > 5s triggers a re-fetch.
compact mode renders inline (banner) without a label; standard mode renders as a bordered box with the label 'Session ends in'.
When session.remaining_seconds <= 0, renders 'Ending now' in warning colour + fires an internal 'session-ending' event that the show.screen can react to.

session.description: Session row. Reads .ends_at + .remaining_seconds + .is_active. Subscribed to broadcast under session.impersonator_platform_user_id.

compact.description: compact = inline horizontal display without label (for banners); standard = bordered card layout

props.className: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-md bg-warning-50 text-warning-900

className.$expr: session.remaining_seconds < 300 ? 'font-mono font-semibold tabular-nums text-danger' : 'font-mono font-semibold tabular-nums'

tick.description: Decrements the local remaining_seconds display. Every 30s ticks re-reads props.session.ends_at from context (in case the source data-source was refreshed via broadcast).

events.name: impersonation.session_extended
events.action: update ends_at from event payload; recompute remaining_seconds

events.name: impersonation.session_forced_terminate
events.action: set is_active=false; render 'Force-terminated' badge for 5s; then hide
